sourceLevelPolicy: sourceLevel fields are retained for data governance and are not displayed directly in the student-facing chart.

homeMedications.brandName: Optional product or brand name. Existing records without this field remain valid.
homeMedications.productName: Optional alias for product or brand name.
homeMedications.tradeName: Optional alias for product or brand name.
homeMedications.ingredient: Optional ingredient name. When absent, UI may fall back to existing drugName for backward compatibility.

dischargeMedications.brandName: Optional product or brand name. Existing records without this field remain valid.
dischargeMedications.productName: Optional alias for product or brand name.
dischargeMedications.tradeName: Optional alias for product or brand name.
dischargeMedications.ingredient: Optional ingredient name. When absent, UI may fall back to existing drugName for backward compatibility.
